facts.place: Šútovo, Turany parish, Slovakia (Suttó, Turány parish, Turócz County, Hungary)

sources.title: Researcher's family group record and pedigree chart (starting information): Jan Gallo born 1893 in Šútovo, Turany Lutheran parish.
Slovakia, Church and Synagogue Books, 1592-1935 — Turány Lutheran parish baptism register, 1893: Jan Gallo
sources.citation: "Slovakia, Church and Synagogue Books, 1592-1935," FamilySearch (https://www.familysearch.org/ark:/61903/1:1:KHWD-N5R : accessed 8 July 2026), entry for Jan Gallo, baptism 1893, Turany, Turócz County; citing "Hungary, Turócz, Religious, from 1653 to 1951."

sources.title: Slovakia, Church and Synagogue Books, 1592-1935 — Turány Lutheran parish baptism register, 1895: Ondrej Gallo (sibling corroboration)
